_publications._publicationTitle: Generation of heterozygous and homozygous NF1 lines from human-induced pluripotent stem cells using CRISPR/Cas9 to investigate bone defects associated with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: To detect off-target activity (OFT), the eight most likely off-target sites predicted by the CRISPOR tool (https://crispor.tefor.net/) were analyzed
details: Successfully predicted eight most likely off-target sites for off-target activity analysis
